devTools.title: DEV tools
devTools.subtitle: Generate server-side test data and exercise the leaderboard through the real API and realtime paths.
devTools.warning: These tools are available locally only. Generating replaces this server's existing mock users.
devTools.removeConfirm: Remove all mock users and their XP events?

generate.title: Populate leaderboard
generate.hint: Creates marked users with random initial XP through the real XP service.

events.title: Test realtime
events.hint: Awards random XP to existing mock users and emits regular SignalR updates.

remove.title: Clean up test data
remove.hint: Reverses mock XP, removes projections and emits realtime removals.
